prompt: I need a deep, audit-readiness review of the open PR on this branch — feat/pas-integration in se-hadron. We're acting as Mysten consultants for the partner (this is the phase-2 PAS integration tracked under SOLENG-653 in Linear, with design docs in Notion). Please run a thorough multi-agent review: 5 parallel reviewers + 1 consolidator, all sui-pilot-agents. Produce a Markdown deliverable with severity-graded findings, evidence quotes, and a methodology section we can attach to the ticket.

assertions.text: Produces a Markdown review file in the outputs directory with at least 200 lines and sections: executive summary, severity tally, HIGH findings, methodology
Produces 5 reviewer JSON files (subagent-1.json … subagent-5.json) in the outputs/.raw/ directory, all schema-valid
Produces _verification_notes.md with consolidator adjudications for HIGH and disputed findings
Produces _context.md with ticket metadata, scope list, dep surface, and finding schema
Every HIGH finding in the final review has a literal code evidence quote (not paraphrased)
Final review has a severity tally table comparing post-verification counts to raw reviewer output
All 6 dispatched agents (5 reviewers + 1 consolidator) use the sui-pilot-agent subagent type
Does not modify any file under /Users/alilloig/workspace/se-hadron/sources/ or scripts/ — outputs go to workspace dir only
